name: Replicate Prediction
description: Structure of a prediction object returned by the Replicate API.

fields.name: version
fields.description: Model version ID used for versioned predictions

fields.name: model
fields.description: Model reference (owner/name) for official model predictions

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current lifecycle status of the prediction

fields.name: output
fields.description: Model output - type varies by model (string, array, object)

fields.name: logs
fields.description: Log output from the prediction container

fields.name: urls
fields.description: Hypermedia URLs for get, cancel, and stream operations

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when prediction was created

fields.name: started_at
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when prediction started processing

fields.name: webhook_events_filter
fields.description: Filter for webhook events: start, output, logs, completed
